results.author: Bianca Zapatka
results.description: These vegan fajitas are easy to make with roasted sheet pan vegetables for a healthy and delicious family meal or Mexican party snack.
ingredients: 2 bell peppers (red, yellow or green, chopped into strips)
7 oz oyster or portobello mushrooms (pulled into strips)
½ tbsp maple syrup (or to taste)
2 tbsp lime juice (or more to taste)
instructions_list: *Note: Check out the recipe video + step-by-step photos above!
Preheat the oven to 392 °F (200 °C).
Cut the bell peppers in half, remove the seeds and chop them into strips. Pull the oyster mushrooms into strips (as shown in the recipe video or in the step-by-step pictures).
Place the vegetables on a sheet pan.
Combine all the ingredients for the marinade in a container and pour over the vegetables. Mix everything well and bake for about 30 minutes until the vegetables are tender, mixing once in between.
Warm the tortillas briefly in a skillet or non-stick pan.

Now assemble the fajitas. To do this, first put some vegetable filling and cilantro lime rice on each tortilla. Top with avocado, aioli, fresh cilantro and sesame seeds and drizzle with a squeeze of lime juice if desired.
Enjoy your meal!
results.title: Vegan Sheet Pan Fajitas

results.author: MrsFlury
results.description: Vollkornwraps - ergibt 8 Stück. Über 35 Bewertungen und für raffiniert befunden. Mit ► Portionsrechner ► Kochbuch ► Video-Tipps!
instructions_list: Zubereitung

Für den Teig Mehl mit Backpulver und Salz in einer Schüssel vermischen. Öl und lauwarmes Wasser hinzufügen und alles verkneten, bis ein glatter Teig entstanden ist. Den Teig in acht gleich große Stücke teilen und diese zu Kugeln formen. Die Teigkugeln 20 Minuten zugedeckt ruhen lassen.
Die Teigstücke nach der Ruhezeit auf einer bemehlten Arbeitsfläche dünn mit dem Nudelholz ausrollen.

Eine Pfanne erhitzen und die Teigfladen bei mittlerer Hitze von beiden Seiten ca. 30 Sekunden backen. Wenn die Tortillas anfangen Blasen zu werfen, diese einfach umdrehen. Damit die Tortillas nicht austrocknen, diese nach dem Backen mit einem Küchentuch bedecken.
Anschließend die Tortillas lecker als Wrap mit den angegebenen Zutaten nach Wahl füllen. Tipp: Sie halten einige Tage in Folie verpackt und lassen sich auch einfrieren.
results.title: Vollkornwraps von MrsFlury

results.author: Jen
results.description: This easy White Chicken Lasagna Soup tastes just like white chicken lasagna with cheesy layers of noodles smothered in velvety Italian spiced Parmesan infused sauce without all the layering or dishes! Simply sauté chicken and veggies and dump in all ingredients and simmer away for a pot of velvety, slurpilicoius flavor!
ingredients: 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breasts, chopped
9-11 cups low sodium chicken broth, divided
15 oz can canneli beans, rinsed and rained
1 tsp EACH dried parsley, dried basil
1/2 tsp EACH dried oregano, dried thyme, salt, pepper
10 uncooked lasagna noodles (broken into approx. 1-2 inch pieces*)
2-3 cups half and half ((may sub fat free evaporated milk))
10 oz chopped frozen baby spinach, thawed
instructions_list: Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large Dutch oven/soup pot over medium high heat. Add chicken and cook until almost cooked through. Remove to a plate.

Melt butter with 2 tablespoons olive oil in the now empty pot and heat over medium high heat. Add onions and carrots and cook, while stirring, for 3 minutes. Add bell pepper and garlic and cook for 1 minute. Sprinkle in flour then cook, stirring constantly for 3 minutes (it will be thick).

Turn heat to low and gradually stir in 8 cups chicken broth. Whisk 3 tablespoons cornstarch with 1 cup additional chicken broth and add to soup. Stir in chicken, beans, chicken bouillon and all remaining herbs and spices. Stir in lasagna noodles.
Bring to a boil then reduce to a simmer until lasagna noodles are tender, stirring occasionally so noodles don’t stick to bottom (approximately 20-30 minutes).

Turn heat to low, discard bay leaf and stir in half and half, optional heavy cream and spinach and warm through. Stir in 1 cup Parmesan cheese until melted. Stir in additional half and half or broth if desired for a less “chunky” soup. Season with additional salt and pepper to taste. Garnish individual servings with desired amount of cheeses.
results.title: White Chicken Lasagne Soup Recipe
